comments.title: Comments
comments.noComments: Be the first to comment on this article.

sidebar.newsletterDescription: Get breaking news and exclusive analysis delivered to your inbox.
sidebar.advertiseDescription: Reach thousands of engaged readers across Rwanda and beyond. Premium ad placements for your brand.

search.title: Search Results
search.tryAgain: Try different keywords or browse our categories.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Have a story tip, feedback, or inquiry? We'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.generalEmailHint: For feedback, corrections, and press inquiries
contactPage.storyTipDescription: Got a lead on a breaking story? Our editorial team reviews every tip. Your identity will be kept confidential.
contactPage.advertisingDescription: Interested in reaching our audience? Contact us for ad placements and sponsored content opportunities.

aboutPage.heroDescription: Menyesha is an independent digital news platform delivering accurate, unbiased reporting from Rwanda and around the world.
aboutPage.missionText: Menyesha was founded with a simple belief: everyone deserves access to truthful, well-reported news. We are committed to delivering stories that inform, educate, and empower our readers — covering local events in Rwanda and the broader African continent alongside international developments that shape our world.

independence.title: Editorial Independence
independence.description: We maintain complete editorial independence, free from corporate or political influence.

factBased.title: Fact-Based Reporting
factBased.description: Every story is thoroughly fact-checked and verified before publication.

perspective.title: African & Global Perspective
perspective.description: We cover stories with local insight from Rwanda and Africa, set in a global context.

realTime.title: Real-Time Updates
realTime.description: Breaking news delivered as events unfold, keeping you informed around the clock.

community.title: Community Focus
community.description: We foster informed discussions and build engaged communities of readers.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We are open about our sources, methodology, and commitment to ethical journalism.

aboutPage.contactDescription: Have a story tip, correction, or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Try searching for what you need.

metadata.title: Menyesha - Know first, know clearly
metadata.description: Stay informed with the latest breaking news, analysis, and stories from Rwanda and around the world.

footer.description: Delivering accurate, unbiased news and in-depth analysis from Rwanda and around the world.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to analyze site traffic and improve your experience. You can accept or decline non-essential cookies.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.introText: Menyesha ("we", "us", or "our") operates the website menyesha.vand.rw. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website.
privacyPage.collectAnalyticsText: When you accept cookies, we use Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage data including pages visited, time spent on pages, device type, browser, country, and referral source. This data does not identify you personally.
privacyPage.collectLocaleText: We store your preferred language (English, French, or Kinyarwanda) in a cookie so the site displays in your chosen language.
privacyPage.collectCommentsText: If you post a comment on an article, we collect the content of your comment and associate it with your account.
privacyPage.cookiesText: We use cookies for the following purposes:
privacyPage.cookieAnalytics: Analytics cookies: Google Analytics (_ga, _ga_*) — only loaded after your consent
privacyPage.cookiesNote: You can accept or decline non-essential cookies when you first visit the site. You can change your preference at any time by clearing your browser's local storage.
privacyPage.sharingText: We do not sell your personal data. Analytics data is processed by Google Analytics under Google's privacy policy. We do not share your information with any other third parties.
privacyPage.rightPortability: Access information we hold about you
privacyPage.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.introText: By accessing and using Menyesha (menyesha.vand.rw), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.
termsPage.useText1: All content published on Menyesha, including articles, images, and graphics, is owned by Menyesha or its content creators and is protected by copyright law.
termsPage.useText2: You may share our articles via social media or link to them, provided you credit Menyesha as the source. You may not reproduce, republish, or redistribute our content without prior written permission.
termsPage.conductText: When using our website, including the comments section, you agree not to:
termsPage.conductItem1: Post false, misleading, or defamatory content
termsPage.conductItem2: Harass, threaten, or abuse other users
termsPage.conductItem3: Post spam, advertisements, or promotional material
termsPage.conductItem4: Attempt to interfere with the website's operation
termsPage.commentsText: We reserve the right to moderate, edit, or remove comments that violate these terms. Comments represent the views of their authors, not of Menyesha.
termsPage.disclaimerText: Menyesha strives for accuracy in all reporting. However, we do not guarantee that all information is complete, accurate, or up to date. News content is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.
termsPage.liabilityText: Menyesha shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of or inability to use this website or reliance on any content published on it.
termsPage.changesText: We may update these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
termsPage.contactText: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:
